resources.string: Keep Screen On when showing image
Hide all images currently displayed on the desktop

1. Select images for single and double tap.
2. Go to the home screen, long-press an empty area and select "Widgets".
3. Find "GhostWidget" and add it to your home screen.
4. Click or double-click the Widget to toggle image display.
5. Note: This widget is completely transparent. The image only shows after a tap/double-tap, and can be hidden again with another tap/double-tap.
6. This widget also works with Samsung Good Lock plugin "LockStar". You can add this widget to your lock screen, perfect for those who want to keep their lock screen clean but need quick access to things like barcodes.
